service.description: Implements the run#DeviceRequestInternal interface for GenICam vision cameras using moqui-jep.

if.message: Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.context.ExecutionContext import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamClient import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamUtil
ExecutionContext ec = context.ec String serialNumber = GenicamUtil.resolveSerialNumber(device, connection) String resolvedOutputDir = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredPath(ec, outputDir, "genicam.images.path", GenicamUtil.DEFAULT_IMAGES_PATH) String resolvedImageFormat = GenicamUtil.resolveImageFormat(ec, imageFormat) Integer resolvedResizeWidth = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeWidth, "genicam.images.resize.width") Integer resolvedResizeHeight = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeHeight, "genicam.images.resize.height") Map<String, Object> pyResults = [:]
try (GenicamClient client = new GenicamClient(ec, ctiPath, serialNumber, deviceId)) { pyResults = client.acquireSingleImage(resolvedOutputDir, resolvedImageFormat, resolvedResizeWidth, resolvedResizeHeight) } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.error("GenICam JEP single image acquisition failed", t) throw t }
context.imageLocation = pyResults?.get("file_path") context.imageFormat = pyResults?.get("extension") context.contentType = pyResults?.get("content_type") context.width = pyResults?.get("width") context.height = pyResults?.get("height")

if.message: Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.context.ExecutionContext import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamClient import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamUtil
ExecutionContext ec = context.ec String serialNumber = GenicamUtil.resolveSerialNumber(device, connection) String resolvedOutputDir = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredPath(ec, outputDir, "genicam.frames.path", GenicamUtil.DEFAULT_FRAMES_PATH) String resolvedImageFormat = GenicamUtil.resolveImageFormat(ec, imageFormat) Integer resolvedResizeWidth = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeWidth, "genicam.frames.resize.width") Integer resolvedResizeHeight = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeHeight, "genicam.frames.resize.height") Map<String, Object> pyResults = [:]
try (GenicamClient client = new GenicamClient(ec, ctiPath, serialNumber, deviceId)) { pyResults = client.acquireVideoStream(numFrames, resolvedOutputDir, resolvedImageFormat, resolvedResizeWidth, resolvedResizeHeight) } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.error("GenICam JEP video stream acquisition failed", t) throw t }
context.acquiredFrames = pyResults?.get("acquired_frames")

if.message: Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.context.ExecutionContext import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamClient import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamUtil
ExecutionContext ec = context.ec String serialNumber = GenicamUtil.resolveSerialNumber(device, connection) String resolvedOutputDir = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredPath(ec, outputDir, "genicam.videos.path", GenicamUtil.DEFAULT_VIDEOS_PATH) String resolvedVideoContainer = GenicamUtil.resolveVideoContainer(ec, videoContainer) String resolvedVideoCodec = GenicamUtil.resolveVideoCodec(ec, videoCodec) Integer resolvedResizeWidth = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeWidth, "genicam.videos.resize.width") Integer resolvedResizeHeight = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeHeight, "genicam.videos.resize.height") Map<String, Object> pyResults = [:]
try (GenicamClient client = new GenicamClient(ec, ctiPath, serialNumber, deviceId)) { pyResults = client.acquireVideoFile(numFrames, fps, resolvedOutputDir, resolvedVideoContainer, resolvedVideoCodec, resolvedResizeWidth, resolvedResizeHeight) } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.error("GenICam JEP video file acquisition failed", t) throw t }
context.videoLocation = pyResults?.get("video_path") context.acquiredFrames = pyResults?.get("acquired_frames") context.fps = pyResults?.get("fps") context.videoContainer = pyResults?.get("container") context.videoCodec = pyResults?.get("codec")

if.message: Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.context.ExecutionContext import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamClient import org.moqui.genicam.GenicamUtil
ExecutionContext ec = context.ec String serialNumber = GenicamUtil.resolveSerialNumber(device, connection) String resolvedOutputDir = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredPath(ec, outputDir, "genicam.servo.path", GenicamUtil.DEFAULT_SERVO_PATH) String resolvedImageFormat = GenicamUtil.resolveImageFormat(ec, imageFormat) Integer resolvedResizeWidth = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeWidth, "genicam.servo.resize.width") Integer resolvedResizeHeight = GenicamUtil.resolveConfiguredInteger(ec, resizeHeight, "genicam.servo.resize.height") Map<String, Object> pyResults = [:]
try (GenicamClient client = new GenicamClient(ec, ctiPath, serialNumber, deviceId)) { pyResults = client.acquireVisualServoFrame(useCachedFrame as boolean, saveSnapshot as boolean, resolvedOutputDir, resolvedImageFormat, resolvedResizeWidth, resolvedResizeHeight) } catch (Throwable t) { ec.logger.error("GenICam JEP visual servo frame acquisition failed", t) throw t }
context.frameBytes = pyResults?.get("frame_bytes") context.jpegBytes = pyResults?.get("jpeg_bytes") context.contentType = pyResults?.get("content_type") context.dataFormat = pyResults?.get("data_format") context.frameFormat = pyResults?.get("extension") context.componentIndex = pyResults?.get("component_index") context.width = pyResults?.get("width") context.height = pyResults?.get("height") context.capturedAt = pyResults?.get("captured_at") context.source = pyResults?.get("source") context.snapshotLocation = pyResults?.get("snapshot_location") context.previewLocation = pyResults?.get("preview_location")

if.message: This service must be called in a web request context.
Connection transportConfig must specify driver path.

log.message: Cleaning up GenICam ToF tensors older than ${thresholdDate} (daysToKeep=${daysToKeep})...
Successfully cleaned up ${deletedCount} old ToF tensors.
